overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking up a grassy mountain trail. The scene begins in fair weather with scattered clouds and transitions to an approaching storm with dark clouds in the final moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain trail with pine trees and rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill on the dirt trail through grassy terrain, approaching a large rock formation on the right

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding uphill through the grass
rolling green hills covered in tall grass and small bushes
sloped grassy terrain with scattered vegetation
large grey rock formation visible on the right side of the trail ahead
group of pine trees atop the hill in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily up a dirt trail through rolling grassy hills dotted with pine trees. A large rock outcropping is visible on the right side of the path, gradually getting closer as the character advances. The sky is partly cloudy with bright natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain trail under dark storm clouds

events.description: dark storm clouds roll in rapidly overhead, dramatically darkening the sky and changing the lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk uphill on the trail as the weather changes to an approaching storm

entered.detail: dark grey storm clouds covering the sky, creating dramatic lighting

segments.scene_description: As the character continues ascending the trail, dark storm clouds suddenly roll in overhead, transforming the bright afternoon into a dramatic, darkened scene. The large rock formation and distant pines are now behind as the path continues upward into the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a mountain trail that transforms from a bright, fair-weather afternoon into a dramatic storm. It begins with the character walking steadily through rolling grassy hills and pine trees under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera advances, the path leads past a large rock outcropping on the right that grows larger in the frame. The scene then shifts abruptly as dark storm clouds roll in overhead, plunging the bright landscape into shadow. The camera continues upward, leaving the rock formation and distant pines behind as the environment descends into a darkened, atmospheric storm.
